subcodes.first_line: The Sun of the remembrance of the name of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, hath risen from the horizon of utterance through My Name, the Mighty, the Inaccessible, and hath called out [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شمس ذکر اسم ربک الرحمن قد اشرقت من افق التبیان باسمی العزیز المنیع و نادی فی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @call to action, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @predictions and prophecies, @suffering and imprisonment
